headline: Target wants rich parents to shop at its stores
summary: For years, Target occupied a unique place in retail. It offered low prices, but shoppers often viewed it as a step above competitors like Walmart. Target was the store where customers could pick up paper towels and laundry detergent but also leave with a stylish lamp, trendy home décor, or a ...

headline: Gasoline Prices Near $4 a Gallon, Again
summary: National average gasoline prices are just under $4 a gallon and could hit that mark in the next day or so, according to Patrick De Haan, the head of petroleum analysis at GasBuddy.  GasBuddy has the national average price at $3.98 a gallon, up 16 cents a gallon from a week ago and 86 cents a gallon from a year ago.  Costco Wholesale's retail gasoline pumps are so popular with members that the warehouse chain is setting up a few standalone stations, according to The Wall Street Journal.

headline: Costco makes surprising change that may hurt its bottom line
summary: For decades, Costco's gas stations have served a purpose beyond selling discounted fuel. They've been one of the retailer's most effective traffic drivers, giving members another reason to visit a warehouse.
